titleEn: Anansi and the Pot of Beans
summaryAm: አናንሲ የባቄላ ሽታ ሲማርከው ትዕግሥትን እና ሐቀኝነትን የሚማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ትንሽ መጠበቅ እና እውነትን መናገር ከችኮላ ይሻላል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ በጓደኛው ቤት የሚበስል ባቄላ ሽታ ሰማ።
pages.textEn: Anansi smelled beans cooking at his friend’s house.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 1: አናንሲ በጓደኛው ቤት የሚበስል ባቄላ ሽታ ሰማ።

pages.textAm: “ትንሽ እጠብቃለሁ” ብሎ ቢናገርም ሆዱ በፍጥነት ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: He said he would wait, but his belly spoke quickly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 2: “ትንሽ እጠብቃለሁ” ብሎ ቢናገርም ሆዱ በፍጥነት ተናገረ።

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ማሰሮውን በቅርብ ተመለከተ፣ ግን እጁን ወደ ውስጥ ማስገባት ጥሩ እንዳልሆነ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: Anansi looked closely at the pot, then remembered he should not reach inside.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 3: አናንሲ ማሰሮውን በቅርብ ተመለከተ፣ ግን እጁን ወደ ውስጥ ማስገባት ጥሩ እንዳልሆነ አሰበ።

pages.textEn: His friend returned and asked him to speak clearly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 4: ጓደኛው ተመልሶ “እባክህ በግልጽ ንገረኝ” አለው።

pages.textAm: አናንሲ “መጠበቅ አስቸጋሪ ሆነብኝ” ብሎ እውነቱን ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: Anansi honestly said waiting had been hard for him.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 5: አናንሲ “መጠበቅ አስቸጋሪ ሆነብኝ” ብሎ እውነቱን ተናገረ።

pages.textAm: ጓደኞቹ ባቄላውን ለመካፈል ሳህኖችን አዘጋጁ። አናንሲም ትዕግሥት ምግብን የበለጠ እንደሚያጣፍጥ መረዳት ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: The friends prepared bowls to share the beans, and Anansi began to understand that patience makes food sweeter.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Anansi and the Pot of Beans, page 6: friends preparing bowls beside a warm pot while Anansi begins to wait patiently.

pages.textAm: አናንሲ ሽታውን ሲሰማ አፉ ውሃ ሞላ። ነገር ግን “ጓደኛዬ እስኪመጣ እጠብቃለሁ” ብሎ ከማሰሮው ትንሽ ራቀ።
pages.textEn: Anansi stepped back from the pot and tried to wait for his friend.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi smelling a pot of beans while standing back politely.

pages.textAm: እሱ ራሱን ለማጽናናት በዛፍ ላይ ተቀመጠ። ወፎች ሲዘምሩ ትንሽ መጠበቅ ቀላል ሆነለት።
pages.textEn: He sat in a tree and listened to birds while he waited.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi sitting in a tree listening to birds near a cooking pot.

pages.textAm: ጓደኛው ሲመጣ አናንሲ ስለ ሽታው እና ስለ ችኮላው በግልጽ ነገረው። ጓደኛውም ሐቀኝነቱን አደነቀ።
pages.textEn: When his friend came back, Anansi spoke honestly and was appreciated.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi speaking honestly with a friend beside a pot of beans.

pages.textAm: ሁለቱ ምግቡ እስኪዘጋጅ ድረስ ሳህኖችን አዘጋጁ። አናንሲ ሥራ ሲረዳ መጠበቅ እንደሚቀል ተረዳ።
pages.textEn: They set the bowls together, and waiting became easier.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Anansi and a friend setting bowls beside a warm bean pot.

pages.textAm: ባቄላው ሲደርስ ሁሉም በእኩል ተካፈሉ። አናንሲም “እውነት እና ትዕግሥት ሆድንም ልብንም ያስደስታሉ” አለ።
pages.textEn: When the beans were ready, everyone shared equally and happily.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Friends sharing bowls of beans equally under a shady tree.
